name: law firms processing 5–15 contracts/month tool
description: For law firms processing 5–15 contracts/month, inefficient conversion causes submission delays. We provide a document conversion service instead of manual formatting and conversion by staff.
problem_solved: Inefficient conversion of legal contracts into court filing formats
